title: Respect exclusive package-pin ceilings
prompt: Repair `package_audit.sh` so its offline audit respects exclusive version pins. The supplied installed, repository, pin, and dependency fixtures model an engine update at exactly the forbidden `< 2.0.0` ceiling. The audit must explain both the direct engine pin hold and the resulting dependent dashboard hold, emit a plan containing only allowed changes, dry-run only those changes, and verify that the simulation contains no unauthorized major-version changes. Candidates strictly below an exclusive ceiling must remain eligible, including when version components contain multiple digits. Keep output deterministic and do not modify anything under `tests/` or `fixtures/`. Success is `bash tests/run_tests.sh` passing from the repository root.
